park_name: Rose Bay Beach Caravan Park Bowen

reviews.review_text:
Amazing ! Space between sites, clean upgraded amenities, beautiful magnesium pool. The beaches are so close and divine. Huge coral gardens just off the beach.
Friendly owners and a fantastic cafe onsite. We highly recommend and will be back !

10/10. Bernie and Tony are the absolute best hosts. The onsite cafe/shop is just wonderful and a local favourite. Stunning views from the communal area. It’s a beautiful boutique site, perfect if you don’t want to be crowded in with hundreds of people. The glamping tent with outdoor bathroom looks INCREDIBLE. No issues with 21ft van whatsoever. Kid friendly. Can’t wait to come back.

This is my fav spot and hope to revisit. Small park with great sites. Pool was lovely and the beach close by was muchly enjoyed by our pooch. Bonus awesome cafe & health store on site too. And the amenities were modern & clean.
All the team were friendly & helpful. Thx

El lugar es tal cual las fotos, todas las instalaciones limpias. Cocina con gas, parrilla y heladera, junto a la pileta.
La amabilidad de Tony no puede describirse, de las personas más atentas que nos han recibido
El café del lugar tiene un menú amplio.
Nos llamó la atención que tuviera tan buenas críticas antes de llegar, y al estar ahí comprobamos por qué, el lugar vale cada estrella, le pondríamos 10 si se pudiera.
Gracias por hacer de nuestros días en Bowen un momento increíble 🤍

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

This place is something special. Rose Bay Caravan Park isn’t just somewhere to stay it’s the kind of place you almost don’t want to tell people about because it feels like your own hidden paradise… but they genuinely deserve every bit of recognition.

From the moment you arrive, you’re met with the most incredible people warm, welcoming, and the kind who go out of their way to make your stay unforgettable. The on-site café? Easily some of the best coffee you’ll find anywhere, not just in a caravan park.

The park itself is a standout small, boutique, and beautifully maintained. The amenities are spotless, modern, and clearly cared for with pride. It’s also genuinely dog-friendly, not just “allowed” your pets are just as welcome as you are.

And the location… absolutely breathtaking. The beach is nothing short of spectacular, and the walking tracks leading to the lookout offer views that you just don’t get tired of. It’s peaceful, stunning, and feels like a true escape.

If you’re even considering staying here,  book it. You will not regret it. We wouldn’t go anywhere else

.
:::

Stayed 2 nights, enjoyed it so much almost stayed a 3rd. New to the caravan life, but this is by far our favourite spot. Quiet, not packed in like sardines. Cafe on site is awesome! Best coffee I’ve had in NQ, great health food selection. Ice cream etc. amenities are renovated, kept clean and close by any site.
Beaches a short stroll away. 5km Walking track nearby, the owners are great, very accommodating, friendly and nothings an issue. Cool camp kitchen/garden bar area.
They’re working hard to make it into something  awesome. Looking forward to returning regularly and watching it change and grow!  Highly recommend.
Great spot, close to the beach + hikes,  kid and dog friendly, with a fantastic camp kitchen and clean amenities!

Great little campground that the owners have been putting in stacks of work since they bought a few years ago. Facilities were newly updated and super clean. Cafe at the front was awesome and good value. They had a fire and tapas on Friday night with some of the locals and just made me feel welcome. Cute dogs was a bonus!
They've got big plans for this place and are doing a great job. About a week second walk to the beach if you're slow, and about 5 minutes to some great snorkeling just to the north.

Absoluter Traum Spot, wir (2Erwachsene und 2 Kinder) waren für zwei Nächte da. Die Besitzer sind sehr herzlich,der Campingplatz familiär belebt. Der Shop bietet sehr viele Produkte und der Kaffee ist herrlich. Die RoseBay ladet zum baden ein. Eine absolute Empfehlung! Herzlichen Dank für den wundervollen Aufenthalt,wenn wir Zeit hätten,wären wir noch länger geblieben.

Lovely caravan Park, perfect location between 2 beautiful bays. Cafe on site with great food and coffee. Nice clean updated amenities. Large camp kitchen with tv, fire pit and bar along the fence overlooking the ocean. String lights all around for the perfect atmosphere. And to top it off a magnesium pool. Will definitely be coming back.

There’s something really special about Rose Bay Beach Caravan Park 🥺😍 Bernie & Tony are the most genuine, easygoing hosts & they’ve created such a welcoming, safe space for families. The amenities are spotless, the magnesium pool is beautiful & the surrounding beaches are stunning. The quiet evenings here felt magical with palm trees, ocean air & the clearest stars at night😍 We will definitely be back🫶🏽

Thank you Tony & Bernie for a fantastic stay at the Rose Bay caravan park. The park is beautifully maintained, the amenities are clean and in good condition and the owners are friendly, warm and hospitable.
We had a wonderful Easter break staying at this park and highly recommend choosing Rose Bay for your Bowen stay.

Best camp spot of our east coast trip! A little gem right next to amazing views and a really good hike and beaches in the backyard. The owner was super flexible and gave us excellent tips on the area and North Queensland. Coffee onsite is definitely also a bonus!

Rose Bay Beach Caravan Park ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

We booked a Glamping Tent for Valentine’s Day weekend and were totally blown away!!

When I made the booking, Bernie casually asked what kind of beer and wine we liked. Because it was so affordable, I honestly didn’t expect much more than a cute tent with a bed… but WOW — we were in for the most beautiful surprise.

From the moment we arrived, we were greeted with the warmest, friendliest welcome from the hands-on owners, Bernie and Tony. You can instantly tell they genuinely care about their guests and take pride in what they’ve created.

The glamping tent was absolutely adorable and perfectly positioned right next to the amenities and kitchen facilities — plus it had a gorgeous ocean view! We stepped up onto the gorgeous deck with comfy deck chairs and a swing for 2, already impressed. After a hot, sweltering day, unzipping the tent to feel the cool air-conditioning (which they had thoughtfully turned on before we arrived!) was next-level luxury.

Then we opened the fridge… and that’s when our jaws dropped.

Inside was the most beautiful antipasto platter - cheese, crackers, salami, spiced almonds, strawberries and more, along with a bottle of wine and a 6-pack of beer.

They truly thought of everything from board games, a beach picnic set, beach chairs and umbrella, beach towels and more. And being directly across the road from the beach made it the perfect location.

Sitting on the deck, feeling the cool ocean breeze, enjoying the view and a few drinks… it honestly made for the most magical and relaxing Valentine’s Day.

The platter and the air-con were the biggest hits! THAT is what we call glamping!

Super cosy, beautifully presented, incredible value, and run by the loveliest people. Oh and having Earthbarcafe Rose Bay right onsite was the icing on the cake! The BEST breakfast and coffee, plus we stocked up on some gorgeous all-natural health supplies from the shop as well. Such a beautiful added bonus to an already perfect stay.

20 stars (not 5!) We absolutely loved it and will definitely be back.

Highly, highly recommend! 🌊💛🍷

I stayed one night in the glamping tent with my two little dogs at this caravan park & was very impressed with how neat & organized yet charming this park was! The owners were lovely, relaxed & very accommodating. You can see the effort that's gone into renovations with lots of stylish little touches. The cafe on the grounds is a bonus! The beach is 2 minutes walk across the road & the suburb of Rose bay is also picturesque & relaxed. The actual bell tent is very comfortable & cosy :)

Absolutely beautiful quiet little park where you can feel safe to leave your things unattended also a great little cafe. Management and staff here absolutely go out of their way to help you out and ensure you enjoy your stay

Best resort location, best hosts ever, and best coffee in town! We love the absolutely idyllic beachside location of Rose Bay and walking directly onto the beach for incredible swimming, sunrises and sunsets, and panoramic views of the Whitsundays. Thank you RRBC! ❤️
Best coffee in Bowen.
Extremely helpfull hosts,  well organised, a great Park, A1 location,  very clean, tidy, and nice people.   Lucky we found this Park.

We stayed here for one night and found this beautiful caravan park truly great! Pool, cafe/shop, clean amenities, quiet, everything we needed was there and the owners put a personal touch to everything. Loved the signs on the washrooms: ManGo and No-ManGo! Thanks for having us!

Hidden Gem.
Suited us perfectly.  Small, quiet and friendly staff.  Can't ask for much more. Lovely beach adjacent. And the coffee is not bad either!

Dieser Caravanpark gehörte mit zu den schönsten, die wir auf unserer Fahrt von Brisbane nach Cooktown erlebt haben. Sowohl auf der Hinfahrt als auch auf der Rückfahrt haben wir halt gemacht. Sehr freundliche Managerin, sehr sauberes Umfeld und ein liebevoller kleiner Laden.

Magnesium pool is the draw card, the health shop, coffee, acai bowls and toasted sandwiches are yummy. Tony and Bernie were very welcoming and shared their local knowledge. Currently renovating but watch this space, it is pleasant now but will be amazing in the future...well done Tony and Bernie, we need more small local caravan parks like yours. If we are ever up this way again we will be back.
Let's support small business.

It’s not a bit park, but Tony and Bernie got BIG personalities and that counts for them. Amenities are very clean and the shop on site makes the best coffee, being a pet friendly park I’m sure people with 4 legged friends will make great use of the park. Tony has his own well trained dogs and there are dog friendly beaches no more than 100 meters from the park. Slabbed sites with water and drainage is well maintained, Tony willing to assist in getting your van perfectly aligned is a big plus. Definitely will be back soon thanks Tony and Bernadette
Terrific location beautiful beaches nearby friendly helpful owners top coffee from Cafe excellent clean facilities we will be bac😁

We absolutely loved our Stay at Tony’s and  Bernie’s little Rose Bay Nugget . They   put their Heart in to transform this Place in Such a lovely little  Gem. The Bathrooms are  lovely renovated with a very personal Touch , Beachy Colours ,Tiles , Benchtops . and Mirrors just so tasteful . Always spotlessly clean . The Campkitchen is so comfy , clean , Tables outside all painted white ( feels a bit like Greece). Under the Roof beautiful big Table and everything there you need !!! Magnesium Pool what a delight !!!
The Earth Cafe onside Omg , Coffee just great !!! Toasties and a Choice of everyday fresh Pastries . The Shop is stocked with the finest of Deli Products sourced from Areas where you get healthy and organic Products , even Cosmetics , Sunscreens etc. of a high Range . The Cafe is visited everyday by the Locals and it’s a great Athmosphere . The Beach is just across the Road , it’s a lovely Suberb and so quiet , but yet not far to drive to Town . The 5 km Walk connecting all the famous Beaches starts just behind the Property and is a must Do .
Clearly we loved our Stay . Thanks to the lovely Bernie and Tony. 🧡😉 by the Way that Mango Smoothie is the best !!!! Plenty of other Smoothies too 😉
Good park, drive throughs, great cafe, walk to beach,nice pool, reasonable

From someone who doesn't camp, I can not fault this park - size is fantastic with kids, you can hear and know where they are at all times.  Service received you cannot fault.  The work these guys do is a testimate to their dedication to continue to improve your experience.  The onsite cafe is sensational, coffee, food and health is all catered for.  Highly recommend for your next stay whether vanning or kicking back in their clamping tent.  Thanks for everything, see you again soon

Mike & Bernie are lovely hosts. Fantastic location. Make sure to walk over to Murray’s Beach . Cafe / Shop has the most delicious food. Shhhhh don’t tell too many people about this little gem of a caravan park .

We booked for 2 nights but we end up staying 5.

We loved  the owners vibes and the harmony of the people that makes the place even greater that what already is.

Also the coffe is amazing 👏
We definitely coming back.

Thank you guys
Davide Francesca and Lory 🐦

Lovely hosts and great clean park close to the water.
Amazing coffee shop on site.
Best spot for bays and exploring and the hosts, Tony and Bernie, are the best!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

What a gem! Rose Bay Caravan Park in Bowen has been one of my absolute faves after five months on the road. Being a smaller park really makes a difference — it’s quiet, relaxed, and right on the beach. The toilets and showers were spotless and nice and roomy, which is always a win.

The owners were fantastic — great communication, super friendly, and even guided us into our spot with the van (much appreciated!). It just has that homely feel that makes you want to stay longer. Highly recommend this spot to anyone passing through. Oh, did I mention the cafe?

We booked for a week & stayed for 2weeks.
Tony & Bernie are so friendly & doing an amazing job with this little park. Fantastic coffee & juices, & excellent range of sweet & savoury treats.So many health products, from protein powders to sunblocks, spices so much to choose from.
Great swimming beach one side & long off lead dog running beach the other side which our dog loved , did I mention the bush walks you can do across to Murray Bay & Horseshoe Bay,
We can’t wait to go back
Sal & Mark

I didn’t stay in the caravan park, but the little store inside is absolutely wonderful! It’s run by lovely locals who make the best coffee and drinks, and it quickly became my go-to spot every morning. The wait times can be a little longer when they’re busy, but that’s to be expected with a small business and it’s absolutely worth it. Highly recommend stopping by for a coffee if you’re in the area!
Lovely little Bay to sit for Orange coffee and watch the sea do its thing

Tony & Bernie mske you so welcome no stress. Smaller site, walk to Rose bay beach, very clean facilities.
Fantastic little big shop with healthy options. Great coffee. Great hosts.

Beautiful little caravan park. Our family of 5 felt so comfortable here, it has everything you need and a really nice feel to the place. It's a very short walk to a lovely little bay and grassed area. Plus their cafe has great coffee 👌👌
Recently stay here for a week, great spot, lovely staff, fabulous cafe at the front!! Close to beaches!! Would definitely stay again!!
Awesome park.. a great team, could not recommend this little gem highly enough 👌.. ❤️..

We stayed here for 11 nights, great spot, PET FRIENDLY, just across from a beautiful dog friendly beach, it's a really quite holiday park, amenities are very clean, they even put your van on site which was fantastic. The owner's Tony & Bernie are so friendly and welcoming, they couldn't do enough for us after my wife spent 5 days in hospital with pneumonia
Fantastic Cafe with beautiful food and coffee, they even have Gluten free food/cakes etc, do yourself a favour and stay here, you won't be disappointed.
We did not stay here  but the on-site cafe is great. We had lunch halfway round the Mother Rock loop.

Really nice spot to stay. Great cafe/shop. Nice selection of ice cream and sorbets that were delicious. The park owners are very accommodating and lovely people. The park is small and cosy. If you have a big van they will assist you with their little forklift to get it in place. The pool was great. Lots to do in Bowen. Great walks with great views and if you’re lucky spot a whale.

Loved this small camp. Protected from the wind. Great pool. Kings beach and Rose bay directly behind camp. Cafe the best we have come across. Vegan , gluten free and the most delicious cakes tarts muffins and coffee. Big vans no problem they will park it for you with their bobcat. Amenities so so clean and lots of hot water.

A great place to stay. A short walk to Rose Beach and Kings Beach and  a short drive to Horeshoe Bay Beach and Gray's Bay Beach giving you a number of options to choose from if there is a wind. A great camp kitchen and outdoor area with beach views. A lovely coffee shop with many interesting sweet treats. Great owners who go out of their way to help you. A nice family run van park with the new owners adding their own touches.

Beautiful area, great food, great coffee, lovely owners BUT…. We were crammed in like sardines and barely room to move on our site, and parking car a real problem! I hope they can keep moving forward with this park as they’ve done so many improvements already, but seriously space is an issue!

Love this small but very complete camp parking. It has around 20 parking slots but the location is perfect. Just a couple of minutes walking to the beach where sunrise is just stunning.
The amenities are good, very complete kitchen and clean and spacious showers (had problems with hot water but it got fixed quickly).
Book in advance to enjoy this lovely caravan park.

Absolutely beautiful small caravan park, 5 stars all round for location, amenities, wonderful cafe selling a large variety of tasty savoury, cakes and treats.  They also stock beautiful organic products from food, detergent to beauty  products.  Not to forget doggie treats.  The new owners Tony and Bernie are wonderful park hosts.  We have travelled around Australia and think we are now at the best!

A walk back into time! Caravan park is like the parks of old - owner is a legend and the coffee at the shop is legendary!

Didn’t like Bowen, however this park made it 5 stars.

Best part - parks ya van for you - legendary.
Small park. Good amenities,  have social gatherings on some nights, great location.  Has on site coffee and food (very good), but is a bit tight for larger vans....but do fit.

AMAZING love the small boutique style park, right near the beach , excellent revamp of bathroom amenities and the onsite coffee shop has everything you need for a quick snack, ice cream or coffee- Bernie & Tony have done an amazing job resurrecting what WAS  a run down park. WE WILL BE BACK!!
Beautiful park with boutique feels. Small, friendly and the best coffee and take away or eat in area. Dog lover’s paradise with a leash free beach. I thought I’d died and gone to heaven 🥂🪸😎🫶🐶
A beautiful location with a clean and inviting feel. They also have the best coffee in Bowen at the cafe, with amazing sweet and savoury options.

We have been here a week and this place is a real pet friendly gem. The amenities are a little dated but they are absolutely spotless. It’s Right opposite a stunning stretch of dog friendly beach and beautiful Rose bay. The sunrise is worth getting up early for. It’s so beautiful from Rose bay. The sites are tight but the owner works his magic and gets even the biggest rigs in. There is a great camp kitchen with a communal fire pit and big tv as well as a big pool. The onsite coffee shop opens at 6am and is a popular spot for locals and tourists to the area which isn’t surprising because the coffee and food are excellent.
We have had a wonderful stay here and will
definitely stay again soon.

Great little caravan park in a gorgeous area! So close to the beautiful bay. The owners were lovely and went out of their way to make sure we enjoyed our stay. Excellent little cafe on site to add to it.
Lovely couple recently bought park and are fixing it up themselves. Beautiful and quiet location and great renovations so far.  Helped us park our rig and offered suggestions for a hike and dinner.

A lovely spot, short stroll to the beach with the most incredible sunrises I’ve seen yet. You can see the love that is being put into the park, easy access to coffee, book exchange, herb garden, pool, modern amenities and prompt help from the owners. So happy we stayed here, can’t wait to get back.
How Great is this place nice little park has got everything
Fantastic little park. Friendly staff. Great location. Very clean amenities.
Great location. Clean amenities. Friendly staff. Tight sites. Gravel road in park, not great in the wet. Expensive.
Ein toller Campingplatz, super gelegen und mit Abstand der sauberste Platz, den wir auf unserer Reise von Brisbane nach Cairns besucht haben.

Bit dubious when we arrived but a good site was found for us and we settled in.  What a really lovely park, small but has great facilities including newly open cafe with great coffee!  Amenities always clean, people so friendly and so close to those beautiful beaches.  Really enjoyed our few days highly recommend.  Kathy & Max

Initially booked for one night but after we had set up,very quickly decided to stay 2 and could easily have stayed 3 or more
What a gem of a caravan park, small, great amenities and fab owners. The cafe only recently opened makes great coffee with a thoughtful selection of food.
Walking distance to the beach which was great for walking the dog.
Thanks
Chrissie

Situated steps from beautiful Rose Bay and the great walks on the headlands. All the amenities you could want are at this small and welcoming park. Newly renovated bathrooms and camp kitchen are clean and modern . The owners are  working very hard to renovate their park and are doing a great job! Thanks for a relaxing and enjoyable stay, Liz and Mike.
What a great place to stay. Quiet , secluded and so peaceful . Upgraded office and cafe /coffee area. Loved this place

Love Rose Bay caravan park ,we will be back for a coffee and cheese cake
Great family run business.
Wishing you the best .
Appreciate you all
The owner is lovely, made us feel very welcome and at home! Amenities are really clean and magnesium pool is amazing! Thank you ☺️

It was by accident that I found this absolute gem!! Quiet and secluded with 20 steps to a gorgeous beach!! The hosts were amazing and amenities spotless. They are doing some renovations so will be even better.  I will be spreading the word!!

Update..May 2025. Back here in Bowen and drove past .. WOW! Renovating! Looking good!😃
The star goes to my husband, who didn't let me book until we got there. OMG! I'm still traumatized at what we saw! It was a derelict ghetto, strewed with rubbish, old couches, ripped tents and tarps. How on earth can the council allow this? Feel so sorry for the neighbourhood. If these people are homeless, they really should get help and support. I can't believe they had an actual sign outside, saying caravan park. I'm so grateful we didn't stay.

Small (24 sites) very hospitable, new owners, (nearly finished renovating), great location.
You might find somewhere as good but you won't find better... Thankyou.
Fabulous small caravan park, clean amenities, quiet, across a dog beach and a wonderful bay! Will definitely come back -amazing find recommended!

Beautiful Rose Bay 💕.Looking forward to coming back already.  Great to catch up with everyone around the camp kitchen after a sunset swim over at the beach. Definitely recommend Site # 16, lovely shady palms.

Great campsite, we really recommend! Good and clean, new facilities. Spacious sites. The pool is really great and open late. The owners are really friendly and helpful. Good location. The walk up mother beddock is good.

Staying in the glamping tent is a must!! I stayed there with my pup whilst enroute to Cairns. It was luxurious, air con, bar fridge, comfy bed. I could really get use to it!! The caravan park is literally across the road from a dog friendly beach, and down the street from a nice quick hike. Bowen itself is lovely. Beautiful restaurants - Lips and the Grand View Hotel do great food. Kevlar coffee is fantastic for coffee and snacks. It's the perfect pet friendly accommodation in North Queensland.

Absolutely love this place , friendly,down to earth owners, amenities are second to none , kitchen has all needs covered and is unequally constructed,it's a stone's throw from the beach ,bushwalks and there's great snorkeling just out the front with beautiful reefs and aquatic wildlife is abundant,can't put this beautiful little oasis in words will definitely be back

A massive thank you to Bernie & Tony for their hospitality and warm welcome during our stay, their park is a slice of paradise and so close to the beach. Their facilities are very good and clean and we definitely will be a return customer. If you’re in Bowen and need a little retreat definitely recommend Rose bay beach caravan park.
Stayed here over the holidays and absolutely loved the park. Bernie and Tony have done such a good job, all the amenities are amazing and it’s in the perfect location!!

I really enjoyed glamping at the rose bay caravan park. Had everything needed in the there to hit the beautiful beaches and swimming pool. The bed was comfortable also and had aircon for the hot summer. The bathroom and camp kitchen facilities are great!  Modern and clean and had everything needed. Tony and Bernie were friendly and helpful with everything we needed and being pet friendly was a bonus when traveling with pets. 😊

Thanks guys it was lovely, your doing a fabulous job. The beaches are amazing and even had a beautiful day over at the island with the tinny. Close to all the walks and beautiful beaches. Hopefully we will be back in the cooler months with the kayacks & snorkling gear. Cant wait ! 🌞🦋🪼🤿🏖🐠🩴🌿🦜

Hi we are the new owners of the Rose Bay Beach caravan park.
We are a small owner operated private tourist facility.
We are now open and are still renovating but mostly done, we have our first glamping tent up and available to book, our pool is now mineral magnesium, the camp kitchen is all done and looking great.The amenities are clean and now fully renovated,new washing machines and dryers are here now.
Some of the reviews prior to us purchasing the park are very confronting and we will like to assure all future clients that this park will be operating at a premium standard. As a tourist park we are no longer accepting permanent tenants or long term tent accommodation by pickers etc. We are a pet friendly park and are accepting bookings now.
Thanks for reading our review and please follow us on Facebook and instagram for any updates.
Also check out our website.
Thanks
Tony and Bernie

This is a little gem of a Park, friendly, clean,quiet, great location, dog friendly, great beaches & walks,magnesium pool is amazing.Tony & Bernie have a great vision for this park & are working hard to achieve it, we look forward to seeing the results as we will definitely be back. Mark & Kris Carnarvon WA

Excellent caravan park with a beautiful cool swimming pool. Very clean and a real “Welcome Home “ park. Will definitely go back and stay a few days. Helpful owners for parking and getting our larger van in and out. Good people having a go !

Really lovely little site. New owners, super helpful and friendly. Spotless refurbed bathrooms, large kitchen area, good laundry facilities. Perfect location by two quiet sandy beaches. Went to sleep with the sound of the waves and had an excellent swim in the morning. The site also has a pool for those who prefer it.

Small park with awesome amenities. Close to dog friendly beaches and laid back vibes!
Magnesium pool, herb garden and great campers made for a cracker of a week!
Great service, walk to the beach, nice quiet place.

A small lovely place with a very personal touch because of the small size. The owners are very nice people and live on the camping ground as well. Amenities are modern and nice as well. Paid 55 $AUD for two people on a powered site
Great owners, kept the place clean and friendly. Highly recommend.

Amazing Service, great camp kitchen and bathroom. New Owners are awesome and will Ti help with any problem.
Currently updating the grounds.
But worth the stay

These tosspots called local security on me for parking car in public parking while fishing. Not illegal, just judgemental. This is why we can't have nice things in Bowen. Just disgusting. Stay at Queens beach. Those caravan/RV
places are actually friendly.

A huge thank you to Bernie and Toni, you guys are amazing, your park certainly shows the time and great efforts you have put into it, this would have to be the best, most relaxing park that is close to the beach and has fantastic facilities and pool.
We wish you all the best with your plans for the park and hope to see you in the future.

Called in for one nights stay,in a big old 15 metre set up ( 5th Wheeler and truck )
We were greeted with smiles from and Tony can do this...in a few minutes we were settled in for the night - thanks Tony, you made it look easy 😀 Off to walk the beautiful beach with fur baby in tow then back to watch the Cowboys win over the Storm on the big screen... awesome facilities,awesome sites and way awesome people
Us old codgers thoroughly recommend Rose Bay Caravan Park ,we will be back 😀

What a beaut lil caravan park. Clean amenities, lovely pool the kids loved. Nice atmosphere.The owners are lovely and very helpful. We enjoyed our stay and will happily come back next time we're up this way.

Not the flashiest van park I have visited, but a work in progress, that I am sure will result in a very nice destination.
The facilities are clean and new looking, the place is in a great location and work is underway for improvements.
Tony could not have been more friendly and helpful, nothing was a bother, from parking my van, providing wood to jack the van up as required., and generally assisting others to get set or make repairs to their vans.
I would love to revisit in a few years, I am sure this park will be world class.
Well done and a big thank you.

Amazing park across the road from a great dog beach! The owners are lovely and very helpful. They came & helped direct us into our spot & told us where everything was. Upgrading the park to be a top spot in Rosebay Bowen!!
Can’t say enough about this little gem and its amazing owners. We’ve just had 8 days here, away from the madding crowds near beautiful beaches.

This spot is amazing and it is only getting better. The new owners are welcoming and caring, and the location is great. If you are looking for a chill, well-taken-care-of caravan park, give this place a go.

Ignore any reviews from before July.
Great place run by great people. Will definitely return.
Not anymore the same amazing caravan park it was before
A small park under friendly new owners who are doing everything right to make it a great place to stay.  Quiet side of Horseshoe Bay- you can hike there across the cape- dog beach and great sunrises.
New owners are lovely, great park with lots of improvements going on will be fantastic when finished! Amenities very nice, camp kitchen area very good!

The hosts are great.
Bernie and Tony are doing everything that the camp looks good and clean. The pool, toilets and kitchen are freshly done and brandnew.
We arrived late the day we booked but they welcomed us very friendly. They helped with the parking and gave us nice advices for the road trip. Its really close to the amazing beaches, but also the supermarkets. We really recommend this camping, because of the amazing hosts.

Bernie and Tony the new owners of this little hidden gem are doing a fabulous job renovating this park at Rose Bay Bowen Hook up to power and water brand new spotless amenities camp kitchen fully equipped new magnesium pool dump point etc lovely views out to bay and next to walking track Nothing was to much trouble when accommodating us into site well done guys we will return there when back in the area

We spent 5 nights here at Rose Bay C/P and cannot recommend it highly enough. Amenities were spotless and modern. Owners could not have been more helpful. And it is pet friendly with beach across the road that is dog heaven. NO leads and a mile of sand. So very friendly and is a works in progress in updating. ***** J & N July 2024

Love our time here owners, Bernie and Tony are super helpful, nothing is too much trouble.
They are in the process of doing major improvements to the grounds, amenities  are top class.
Don't pass it up.

We recently stayed at this caravan park on 11th july for 3 nights the new owners Tony and Bernie have only owned this park for a few months and are doing wonders on  bringing this great spot back o her former glory ,we will certainly be back . Job well done to you both.

Ignore all the previous bad reviews! Tony and Bernie are the new, super-friendly owners and doing a brilliant job turning this park into something truly great. Yes they are still renovating (July 24) but everything is working as it should and the park is looking great. It's in an awesome location with a dog beach at your doorstep and very close to Bowens other beautiful beaches. Highly recommend.

Great little boutique caravan park. New owners are tapping away with improvements! Thanks Tony and Bernie for a lovely clean dog friendly stay. Dog beach tuckered out our Leo. Walk along Cape Edgecumbe Walking track was gorgeous!
The dump is closed
